# DesktopPrivacyShield v0.1.0

First usable release of DesktopPrivacyShield for Windows desktop privacy overlay scenarios.

## Highlights

- Fullscreen privacy overlay for Windows desktop sessions
- Multi-monitor coverage
- Password unlock with PBKDF2 local hashing
- Retry throttling on failed unlock attempts
- System tray control and global hotkey `Ctrl + Alt + L`
- Idle-triggered overlay locking
- Windows startup registration
- Native Windows lock entry point
- Basic settings window
- Windows x64 installer package

## Assets

- `DesktopPrivacyShield-Setup-0.1.0.exe`
- `SHA256SUMS.txt`

## SHA256

```text
9368572A68D835FFE0183C367156EBDEC9A863CEA48866619032F2444A9885E4  DesktopPrivacyShield-Setup-0.1.0.exe
```

## Notes

- This is not a system-level security lock screen.
- For actual system security, use Windows lock screen with `Win + L`.
